synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-28001 Oracle Linux 8 leapp-repository bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28001
description:
[0.20.0-2.0.26]
- Update aarch64 problematic package list [Orabug: 38658490]

full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28001

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28001.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-0.20.0-2.0.26.el8.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-deps-0.20.0-2.0.26.el8.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-0.20.0-2.0.26.el8.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-deps-0.20.0-2.0.26.el8.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/leapp-repository-0.20.0-2.0.26.el8.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.20.0-2.0.26]
- Update aarch64 problematic package list [Orabug: 38658490]
- Support OL9.7 as a target upgrade path [Orabug: 38544272]
